name: materiality-table
definition: A 'material delta' is any change to a field path listed in rules[]. A delta on a field path listed in neither rules[] nor ignore[] is logged to the exceptions queue as diff.unclassified and never auto-published.

rules.note: Negative inference — rule-(c) carve-out (design.md 1.4c): entitlement-scoped; event data.source_kind='api-absence'; requires class-(a) corroboration before confirmation.

docs-HTML extraction rules are versioned code (design.md 1.2.3); each extraction_rule_id declares its target event type in the source registry. Rule output with no declared type falls through to diff.unclassified.

ignore.description: Markup/styling-only changes, boilerplate, navigation, footers — never surfaced by extraction rules
Array element reordering with equal canonicalized content
Whitespace-only string deltas (strings are NFC-trimmed before comparison, design.md 1.4)
